subject: Church website contact form not sending emails
description: The contact form submissions are not being delivered to the church office inbox.

subject: Online donation portal returns 500 error
description: Members trying to give online receive a server error after clicking Submit.

subject: Building committee minutes page shows 404
description: The /committee/minutes page is returning a 404 error after a recent website update.

subject: Prayer request form submit button not working
description: Clicking Submit on the prayer request form does nothing in any browser.

subject: Choir rehearsal schedule page not updating
description: The choir page is displaying June 2025 dates instead of December 2026.

subject: VBS registration page not loading on mobile
description: The Vacation Bible School registration page fails to load on Android phones.

subject: Member portal password reset not working
description: Member says she requested a password reset but never received the email.

subject: Donation receipt emails not being sent
description: Several members report not receiving automated receipts after donating online.

subject: Women's Auxiliary calendar events missing
description: June Women's Auxiliary meeting dates do not appear on the main church calendar.

subject: Deacons resource page access denied
description: Deacon Henry Moss cannot log in to the password-protected deacons page.

subject: Sunday school curriculum page outdated
description: Page still displays 2025 curriculum. Need 2026 materials posted.

subject: Men's Fellowship event flyer PDF link broken
description: The download link for the June Men's Fellowship flyer returns a 403 error.

subject: Choir audio recordings link returning 404
description: The Easter choir recording link shared in the newsletter leads to a missing page.

subject: Newsletter signup not saving new subscriptions
description: New subscribers enter their email but never receive confirmation and are not added to the list.

subject: Building permit documents upload fails
description: Trying to upload PDF files through the building committee portal returns a file-size error.

subject: Sunday service time shown incorrectly on website
description: Two different service times appear on the home page and the visitor info page.

subject: Outreach event registration confirmation not sent
description: Member registered for the May 3rd outreach dinner but received no email confirmation.

subject: Baby dedication request form email not delivered
description: Submitted baby dedication request form but Pastor Wilkins says he never received it.

subject: New member information packet request
description: Visitor asked for new member welcome materials via website chat.

subject: Online tithing setup instructions needed
description: Member wants guidance on setting up recurring weekly tithes through the giving portal.

subject: Bereavement ministry contact information request
description: Member asking for bereavement ministry contact details not found on the website.
